description:
Recto: Note in Arabic script, possibly a miniature petition or report ("yunhī," l. 2). Mentions a jahbadh (end of l. 3). Needs further examination. In the margin, in a different hand, mentions "23 dirhams."

Verso: Tax receipt, maybe for the capitation tax of Ibrāhīm b. Shākir.
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
